name: YCSB-inspired baseline profiles
notes: Values are normalized latency index numbers where lower is better. They are not absolute latencies and are used for workload-shape comparison only.
references: Cooper et al. (2010), Benchmarking Cloud Serving Systems with YCSB, SoCC.
Lim et al. (2021), A Comprehensive Evaluation of Key-Value Stores for Cloud Data-Intensive Applications.

workload_mapping.range_query: Scan-heavy profile analogous to YCSB scan workloads
